creator: terry-freebsd@glaver.org
text:
Created attachment 190704
Config file, with hostname changed to example.com

I updated one of my systems to r361539 and a check added in r461277 appears to be checking for "localhost" in mm_cfg.py and finding it, despite it not being defined. This leads to a very ambiguous error message, "Start of mailman refused due to insufficient configuration."

My mm_cfg.py is attached, in sanitized form.
